name: pi-otel
description_en: OpenTelemetry traces for pi-coding-agent — per-prompt span tree (interaction → llm_request, tool.<name>) exported via OTLP. Aspire-dashboard ready.
description_zh: pi-coding-agent 的 OpenTelemetry 追踪 — 每个 prompt 的 span 树（interaction → llm_request, tool.<name>）通过 OTLP 导出。Aspire-dashboard 就绪。
